title: Medical
scope: Family medical tracker: per-member medications with refill-nag reminders, recurring treatments (injections/infusions), a medical event journal (visits, surgeries, labs, notes), lab results with trend history, and medical-equipment maintenance. NOT a diagnosis or clinical-advice tool — it's a household record and reminder system.

specs.title: Add a member
specs.behavior: Adding records a family member in the medical tracker.

specs.title: List members
specs.behavior: Listing returns all family members in the medical tracker.

specs.title: Add a medication
specs.behavior: Adding tracks a medication for a member with its dosing and refill cycle.

specs.title: List medications
specs.behavior: Listing returns medications with their refill status.

specs.title: Update a medication
specs.behavior: Updating changes only the supplied fields of a medication record.

specs.title: Mark a medication ordered
specs.behavior: Marking ordered stops the 'needs ordering' nag; the nag continues daily as 'ordered, awaiting fill'.

specs.title: Mark a medication filled
specs.behavior: Marking filled advances the last-dose date by the supply duration and resets the refill cycle.

specs.title: Upcoming refills
specs.behavior: Upcoming refills returns medications needing a refill within the next N days.

specs.title: Log a medical event
specs.behavior: Logging records a medical event — visit, surgery, procedure, lab, note, or emergency.

specs.title: List medical events
specs.behavior: Listing returns medical events with optional filters.

specs.title: Add a treatment
specs.behavior: Adding records a recurring treatment (injection, infusion) for a member with its interval.

specs.title: Log a treatment
specs.behavior: Logging records an instance of a treatment and advances its next-due date by the interval.

specs.title: List treatments
specs.behavior: Listing returns recurring treatments with their due status.

specs.title: Add a lab test
specs.behavior: Adding registers a lab test on the master list.

specs.title: Log lab results
specs.behavior: Logging records lab results for a member.

specs.title: Results by date
specs.behavior: Results-by-date returns all recorded lab results for an exact date.

specs.title: Lab history
specs.behavior: Lab history returns historical results (trend) for a specific test.

specs.title: List equipment
specs.behavior: Listing returns medical equipment such as dialysis machines and supply systems.

specs.title: List equipment tasks
specs.behavior: Listing returns equipment maintenance tasks and their due dates.

specs.title: Due equipment tasks
specs.behavior: Due-tasks returns equipment maintenance due soon or overdue.

specs.title: Complete an equipment task
specs.behavior: Completing marks an equipment maintenance task done.

specs.title: Search medical records
specs.behavior: Searching matches across medications, treatments, and events.
